item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested SMS parking-reminder overlay, identifies the repeated pattern of local information overlays across invitation, signup, signage, and SMS, and moves upstream to ownership of the whole guest-arrival information chain. It proposes consolidation via a single source, responsible owner, and publishing boundary without supplying any usable parking reminder copy or implementation patch."}
